de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.translation

Class JavaIntegerSemanticsHelper

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.translation.JavaIntegerSemanticsHelper

  • public class JavaIntegerSemanticsHelper
extends Object
    Helper class for sl-parsers dealing with Java's type promotion for integers.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private SLTranslationExceptionManager excManager 
      private IntegerLDT integerLDT 
      private TermBuilder tb
